home.hero_desc: Data transparency for global environmental impact.
home.why_desc: Transparent data is the first step towards global climate accountability. We provide a platform to visualize and analyze carbon footprints across various sectors and countries.

emissions.title: Emissions
emissions.desc: Here you'll find info about emissions. The table below shows the CO2 output of selected companies in tons per year.

sustainability.title: Our Commitment to
sustainability.subtitle: Sustainability
sustainability.intro: Sustainability is more than just a buzzword; it's the foundation of a resilient future.
sustainability.why_desc: Sustainability is good because it ensures that we meet the needs of the present without compromising the ability of future generations to meet their own needs. It promotes ecological balance and long-term economic stability.
sustainability.measure_desc: By tracking carbon emissions, organizations can identify inefficiencies and transition to cleaner energy sources. Every ton of CO2 reduced is a step toward a healthier planet.
sustainability.cta_desc: Start by exploring our data transparency dashboard.

footer.tagline: Empowering data transparency in a changing climate.

about_project.title: The Project
about_project.subtitle: IU International University of Applied Sciences
about_project.university_info: This website was developed as a case study for IU. It demonstrates modern web development practices using Vue 3, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.
about_project.task_placeholder: The assignment was to design and develop a publicly accessible web application for a non-profit organization dedicated to combating climate change. The primary goal of the platform is to create global transparency by visualizing the annual CO2 emissions of various countries and corporations.

imprint.title: Imprint
imprint.subtitle: Legal information and contact details.
imprint.placeholder_text:
Here would the imprint be written.

CO2 Tracker is a non-profit project dedicated to climate data transparency. All data displayed is for informational purposes and sourced from publicly available environmental reports.

not_found.title: Oops! Lost in Space?
not_found.desc: The page you're looking for seems to have vanished into thin air. Let's get you back on track!
